item.title: Oasis Medical, Inc.: Oasis Tears PF, Preservative-Free Lubricant Eye Drops, 10mL/0.34 Fl OZ Bottle, Sterile, Manufactured for: OASIS Medical, Inc., 514 S. Vermon Recall
item.product: Oasis Tears PF, Preservative-Free Lubricant Eye Drops, 10mL/0.34 Fl OZ Bottle, Sterile, Manufactured for: OASIS Medical, Inc., 514 S. Vermon
item.summary: Lack of Assurance of Sterility: The recall is being initiated out of an abundance of caution following FDA observations noted during a recent inspection of Excelvision. Product details: Oasis Tears PF, Preservative-Free Lubricant Eye Drops, 10mL/0.34 Fl OZ Bottle, Sterile, Manufactured for: OASIS Medical, Inc., 514 S. Vermont Ave., Glendora, CA 91741, USA, Made in France, NDC 42126-6400-1.
item.payoutAmount: Refund, replacement, correction, or disposal if stated by the official notice
